properties.Test Case: Change Windows "Regional format" to English (Swedish) such that the Decimal symbol is a comma rather than a period. Try stuff, including license dialog. Since number parsing bugs could happen anywhere, please do the remainder of your tests this day using this setting. [For Linux, maybe try starting Bloom like this: "LANG=fr_FR.UTF-8 /usr/bin/bloom" to simulate having a European setup?]. Update Fix postponed to 5.8 board.

properties.Test Case: Change UI language several times. Be sure to check the "Show translations which have not been approved yet" menu item to get the maximum coverage. Ensure all strings are localised immediately. Select "Other Collections" and change the UI language there. [N.B. willing to live with BL-12393]
